title: WireProposalIndex
description:
`GET /v1/workspaces/{ws}/proposals` response — every OPEN proposal in the workspace, author-message
first. The caller splits inbox (others') from outbox (own) by `proposer`. Member-scoped.

WireProposalEntry.description: One open proposal in the workspace's review inbox.

base_version_id.description: The base version the proposal was built on (64-char lowercase hex).

created_at.description: When the proposal was opened (the server-stamped string).

message.description: The author's message (the proposed version's commit message) — what a reviewer reads FIRST.

stale.description: Whether `current` has moved since the proposal's base (a stale proposal needs a re-propose).

version_id.description: The proposed version's commit id (64-char lowercase hex) — the review target handle.
